name: Apricot Holiday Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Apricot preserves or Orange marmalade
recipeInstructions: Cream together butter and sugar in a large mixing bowl. Beat in egg. Add orange juice and peel and apricot preserves (or orange marmalade). Mix well. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl. Beat the flour mixture into the butter mixture until dough forms. Drop rounded tablespoons of batter onto foil-lined, greased baking sheets. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cookies are brown around the edges.
